{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/104438732?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/shivamkumarcyber/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/shivamkumarcyber/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/shivamkumarcyber/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/shivamkumarcyber/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/shivamkumarcyber", "id": 104438732, "login": "shivamkumarcyber", "node_id": "U_kgDOBjmbzA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/shivamkumarcyber/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/shivamkumarcyber/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/shivamkumarcyber/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/shivamkumarcyber/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/shivamkumarcyber/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/shivamkumarcyber", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-50141", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-290", "name": "Authentication Bypass by Spoofing"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-639", "name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}], "description": "### Impact
A vulnerability in Woodpecker CI's gRPC layer allowed any authenticated agent to impersonate any other agent on the same server by injecting a forged `agent_id` value into outgoing gRPC metadata. The server correctly verified the JWT token but then discarded the verified agent identity in favor of the client-supplied value.

### Patches
Direct patch: https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker/pull/6567
Later proper fix: https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker/pull/6569

### Workarounds
Disable org agents (`WOODPECKER_DISABLE_USER_AGENT_REGISTRATION=true`) and delete existing ones

### Resources
Public ref: https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker/issues/6541
Private com: https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker-security/issues/21", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00246, "percentile": 0.15566}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-g7mm-9vx7-jm7h", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-14T19:00:29Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g7mm-9vx7-jm7h", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-g7mm-9vx7-jm7h"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-50141"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-18T14:17:29Z", "published_at": "2026-07-14T19:00:29Z", "references": ["https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker/security/advisories/GHSA-g7mm-9vx7-jm7h", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-50141", "https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker-security/issues/21", "https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker/issues/6541", "https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker/pull/6567", "https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker/pull/6569", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g7mm-9vx7-jm7h"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker/security-advisories/GHSA-g7mm-9vx7-jm7h", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker", "summary": "Woodpecker gRPC agent_id metadata can be spoofed- cross-tenant agent impersonation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-14T19:00:31Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-g7mm-9vx7-jm7h", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.14.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "go.woodpecker-ci.org/woodpecker/v3"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0, < 3.14.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Woodpecker gRPC agent_id metadata can be spoofed- cross-tenant agent impersonation
